content: Released Version v0.6.3. Enhanced 16-Bit Flight Simulator graphics and flight mechanics. Rendered a high-detail F-14 Tomcat fighter jet sprite with wingtip navigation lights (red/green) and heat haze thrust, added 3D vertical wayfinding light beams and HUD directional indicators for target rings, calibrated smooth flight steering sensitivity, and consolidated touch UI to 3 distinct buttons (Gear, Flaps, Cannon).

Released Version v0.6.2. Optimized 16-Bit Flight Simulator for mobile touch devices. Added intuitive virtual touch-yoke drag gestures (drag thumb anywhere on screen canvas with spring return), calibrated forward flight speed, rendered dual-wing neon plasma cannon tracer bolts with wing muzzle flashes, and cleaned up mobile UI with dedicated touch action buttons.

Released Version v0.6.1. Complete overhaul of 16-Bit Flight Simulator graphics and flight mechanics. Added real-time 3D Mode-7 scrolling terrain, horizon wing-banking rotations, third-person aircraft sprite with thruster animations and ground altitude shadows, stable level flight trim, and a camera view toggle button (Chase Cam / Cockpit HUD).

Released Version v0.6.0. Scaffolded Node 11: 16-Bit Flight Simulator. Built a retro Mode-7 style pseudo-3D flight simulation engine featuring 16-bit cockpit HUD telemetry (attitude horizon, altimeter, heading compass, speed & throttle meters, mini radar), pitch/roll flight yoke controls, synthesized chiptune engine SFX, target ring flight courses, runway landing maneuvers, and cannon fire interactions.

Released Version v0.5.1. Calibrated Ping Pong Arcade movement physics with normalized delta-time calculations for consistent speed across high-refresh mobile and desktop displays (60Hz to 144Hz+). Reduced default ball speed to 'Relaxed' mode (3.8 px/frame), expanded speed selection to 5 discrete tiers (Super Slow, Relaxed, Normal, Fast, Hyper), and added a Rally Speed Acceleration toggle (Off, Gentle, Arcade).

Released Version v0.5.0. Scaffolded Node 10: Ping Pong Arcade & Simulation Tool. Built a responsive table tennis tool with multi-touch mobile support (direct touch-drag + touch button controls), desktop keyboard/mouse controls, synthesized Web Audio SFX, adjustable AI difficulty levels (Easy, Medium, Hard, Cyber), 2-player local mode, practice wall mode, particle FX, speed tracking, and customizable visual court themes.

Released Version v0.4.0. Redesigned layout and responsiveness. Fixed header stickiness on scroll by changing 'overflow-x: hidden' to 'overflow-x: clip' in the global stylesheet, as 'hidden' incorrectly defined a scroll container that captured sticky calculations. Re-anchored the topnav to span full viewport width (w-full) while keeping navigation elements aligned. Integrated responsive base typography scaling via media queries on the HTML root element for better legibility on larger displays. Embedded Lucide icons (@lucide/astro) across all 9 active labs on both the Hub dashboard grid and inside each laboratory's detail page headers. Corrected the live site deployment URL link in the footer.

Released Version v0.3.1. Upgraded Node 08: EU Tech Valuations with EUR (€) support, added Zalando SE and AUTO1 Group SE, and implemented customizable polynomial regression (linear, quadratic, cubic, exponential) with timeframe window selection. Upgraded Node 09: Loan Calculator to support EUR (€), added a secondary Calculate Payoff Date mode with annual extra payments (Sondertilgung) schedules, and updated the visual stacked bars and schedules.

Released Version v0.3.0. Added two new interactive laboratories. Node 08: EU Tech Valuations, which enables users to compare historical metrics of Europe's top tech firms and project their future revenues and valuations via customizable growth models and dynamic SVG chart paths. Node 09: Loan Calculator, which lets users model repayment compositions over time with support for extra monthly payments, visual stacked bar charts, and collapsible amortization schedules.

Released Version v0.2.3. Resolved mobile horizontal scrollbar leakage by applying HTML/body overflow-x constraints. Repositioned the mobile theme switcher into the main list inside the off-canvas drawer to prevent layout clipping. Scaled up global typography sizes to enhance reading comfort. Expanded the main desktop grid width to max-w-7xl (1280px) for a more modern, spacious hub and sidebar layout. Migrated World Cup and Oilers trackers to fetch directly from ESPN scoreboards without proxies.

Released Version v0.2.2. Restored authentic historical blog logs. Migrated all layouts and laboratory pages to standard Tailwind v4 theme variables. Solved ESPN scoreboard CORS proxy failures using AllOrigins raw redirects. Fixed mobile off-canvas drawer transparency, stabilized sticky header overlays, and added a Bletchley name origin study to the About page.

Released Node 07: Full-screen interactive slideshow detailing 'The Architecture of Agent-Led Software'. Built with mobile touch swipe gestures, desktop arrow keys, slide progress indicators, and glowing presentation cards.

Released Node 06: Gravity Orbit Sandbox. Honoring the Antigravity agent name, this Newtonian orbits sandbox lets users click-drag to launch planetary bodies around a massive glowing star with custom time steps, G-constants, and orbit trails.

Released Node 05: Neural Network Sandbox. Created a visually rich feedforward neural network simulator. Users can click nodes to fire colored signal pulses through synapse layers and compare ReLU, Sigmoid, and Tanh activation algorithms.

Released Node 04: Berlin Weather App. Integrated the Open-Meteo API using direct client-side requests to fetch temperature, wind speeds, humidity, and scrollable hourly forecasts for Berlin without requiring authentication keys.

Released Node 03: World Cup Scoreboard. Integrates ESPN's hidden scoreboard endpoint using a client-side CORS proxy prefix. Solved the HTTPS live page CORS blocking issues to display tournament brackets, flags, and scores.

Released Node 02: Edmonton Oilers Tracker. Queries weekly schedule fixtures and live scoring stats using the public NHL API through a client CORS proxy to bypass cross-origin restrictions on the live GitHub Pages site.

Released Node 01: Typocraft Playground. Swapped standard static fonts for Vercel's official 'geist' npm package. Declared relative woff2 @font-face rules in the global stylesheet, enabling real-time font-variation-settings configuration.

Project Bletchley scaffolding complete. Set up a static multi-page workspace using Astro v6, Tailwind CSS v4, and base relative path configurations (/project-bletchley) ready for deployment. Initial base framework pushed to main.
